chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1860 of 2023 SCRA 1861 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal 23.01.2026 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the applicant These references are pending since 2023 remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. It appears that almost three years no effort has been made by the department in such regard. Prima facie the applicant department is not interested in proceeding with these matters. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these references are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
